keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $712.60 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $744.78 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Mixed — watch only — wait for confirmation.
Signals are conflicted — let the first 30 minutes set the tone before committing risk.
Use QQQ $712.60 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: BA CALL — enter $7.84–$8.66, target $12.38+, stop $4.95.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -1.73% and SPY -0.13%. Composite sentiment -4 (Mixed). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, market breadth (a/d), vix. VIX at 14.33 (-1.35%). Environment read: watch only — wait for confirmation. Industrials (+3.62%) is leading while Consumer Discretionary (-3.54%) lags. Premarket strength in AAPL, NFLX; weakness in TSLA, META. The desk's highest-conviction setup is BA (6.8/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
